description_long: This is a modern, two-seater chaise with a robust wooden frame and sleek, black, glossy cushioned seating. The seat and backrest are composed of segmented, padded sections that provide both comfort and a contemporary aesthetic. The armrests are wide, flat, and extend horizontally from both sides, matching the wood finish of the frame. The base consists of a minimalist, black metal structure with straight lines, giving the piece a floating appearance and ensuring stability. The back and sides are fully enclosed with wood panels, while the front is open for easy access. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern, two-seater chaise with a wooden frame, glossy black segmented cushions, and a minimalist black metal base. Features wide armrests and a fully enclosed back and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the segmented black cushions, wide wooden armrests, and open seating area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden side panel and the profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the metal base structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the armrest and side panel.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and fully enclosed with a wooden panel on the exterior and segmented, glossy black cushions on the interior. It features a modern, minimalist design with no visible decorative elements or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, wide, flat, and made of wood, extending horizontally from the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, made of black metal, and form a rectangular base that supports the entire structure. The design is minimalist with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid black synthetic leather with a glossy finish, segmented into individual padded sections for both the seat and backrest. There is no visible tufting or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are six attached, evenly spaced cushions forming the seat and backrest, all of similar size and arranged in a single row for each section. The cushions are integrated into the frame and not loose.
